Why Choose Us

The ID & UUU Difference

We don't just sell cars — we match you with the right vehicle at the right price, with full support every step of the way.

🔍

Verified Vehicles

Every car is thoroughly inspected, title-checked, and verified before listing. No hidden issues, no surprises.

💰

Best Prices

Competitive, transparent pricing with room for negotiation. We believe in fair deals for every customer.

🚗

Wide Selection

From budget-friendly options to luxury rides — foreign used, brand new, and locally used vehicles always in stock.

📲

Instant Response

Reach us instantly via WhatsApp or call. We respond fast and guide you through every step of the purchase process.

About Us

Built on Trust. Driven by Quality.

ID & UUU Motors has been Abuja's trusted destination for quality automobiles. Located at Total Filling Station, Kuje, Abuja — we've helped hundreds of families and individuals drive their dream cars at honest prices.

  • 5+ years serving the Abuja automobile market
  • Foreign used (Tokunbo), Brand New & Locally Used options
  • Japanese & Canadian spec vehicles available
  • Flexible payment discussions & installment options
  • All vehicles come with proper documentation
Talk to Us on WhatsApp →
